title: Violeta's Beautiful Layout
excerpt: Hello! I am Violeta Scrap and I am delighted to show you again my scrap projects so you can have some inspiration. I have made some layouts with the pictures of my friend’s wedding. I met her thanks to scrapbooking.…
body:
Hello! I am Violeta Scrap and I am delighted to show you again my scrap projects so you can have some inspiration.

I have made some layouts with the pictures of my friend’s wedding. I met her thanks to scrapbooking. I have made this layout with the pictures of the beginning of the wedding and the invitation of the event as the main element of decoration.

For this Project I have used the new Amy Tangerine’s collection “Shine On” because its colors are very beautiful and they combine perfectly with the wedding pictures. I have used a white basic cardstock as the base of the Project.  I have glued over a stripe of the paper “Planted” of the new collection “Shine On” in brown colors combining with the colors of the invitation.

For the title, I have combined a white alphabet, a Golden alphabet and a Brown alphabet in different sizes and materials.

As main element decorating the layout I have used the envelope and the invitation of the wedding. Plus, I have added some blue hearts of the new Amy Tangerine’s collection “Shine On”.

It is a very simple Project that you can make with few materials. You can combine the different papers from the Amy Tangerine’s collection “Shine On”.I am sure that you can make this Project with pictures of a very special day. And with Amy’s papers the result is amazing.

Violeta Scrap Blog| Instagram| Twitter| Facebook| YouTube

Supplies: Shine On - 12x12 Double Sided Paper - Planted (348227), Shine On - Inflated Ephemera (348252), Shine On - Puffy Stickers (348255), Shine On - Thickers

Thanks so much for sharing this layout with us, Violeta! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop ON A WHIM now! Check your local retailer and online at Simon Says Stamp and Scrapbook.com
